classification: REPORT CONTINUITY AUDIT — Historical Report Preservation Analysis

report_corpus_state.discrepancy_reason: Local workspace is behind origin/main (runner has committed newer reports not yet pulled to local)
report_corpus_state.reports_in_git_confirmed: reports/ directory tracked in main branch (not in .gitignore)

historical_preservation_pre_fix.mechanism: clean: false on Pages deploy (preserves existing gh-pages files not in rsync)
historical_preservation_pre_fix.weakness_1: Only preserves what was previously deployed — first-time deployment of a report ID has no fallback
historical_preservation_pre_fix.weakness_2: Relies on gh-pages branch state, not on guaranteed working tree completeness
historical_preservation_pre_fix.weakness_3: If gh-pages branch is corrupted or force-replaced, history is lost
historical_preservation_pre_fix.weakness_4: Shallow clone (fetch-depth: 1) prevents ORIG_HEAD recovery of lost reports
historical_preservation_pre_fix.weakness_5: rsync of folder: . includes 70k files but no guarantee all reports reached gh-pages

historical_preservation_post_fix.mechanism_1: dist/reports/ copies ALL reports from working tree every run
historical_preservation_post_fix.mechanism_2: clean: true on Pages deploy — gh-pages = exact dist/ mirror (reports always current and complete)
historical_preservation_post_fix.mechanism_3: fetch-depth: 0 — full history available for ORIG_HEAD recovery
historical_preservation_post_fix.mechanism_4: build_dist_artifact.py HARD FAILs if any report is missing from dist/
historical_preservation_post_fix.mechanism_5: reports/ tracked in git — historical reports survive any future checkout

continuity_invariants.invariant: All manifest report_url paths exist in working tree
All working tree reports exist in dist/
All dist/ reports are in deployment_manifest.json
continuity_invariants.fail_action: Manifest would be incomplete if rglob fails (script exception)

continuity_invariants.invariant: All manifest report paths have SHA-256 checksums matching dist/ files
All deployed report URLs return HTTP 200

orphan_report_analysis.orphan_in_dist_not_in_manifest: IMPOSSIBLE — manifest is built FROM dist/ files
orphan_report_analysis.orphan_in_manifest_not_in_dist: IMPOSSIBLE — manifest build exits immediately if rglob returns nothing
orphan_report_analysis.orphan_in_feed_not_in_dist: DETECTED by build_dist_artifact.py HARD FAIL gate
orphan_report_analysis.orphan_in_dist_not_in_feed: ALLOWED — historical reports not in current feed are preserved but not linked
orphan_report_analysis.status: PASS — no orphan report scenarios can produce customer-facing 404

fetch_depth_0_benefits: ORIG_HEAD resolvable — stash recovery can restore lost reports from prior commit
Full deployment history — can identify when a report was last correctly deployed
Rollback capability — git checkout {sha} -- reports/{path} restores any historical report
Blame and lineage — can trace which pipeline run introduced a specific report
fetch_depth_0_risks: Slower checkout — full history fetch is larger than depth:1
Mitigation: checkout timeout set to 20min — sufficient for full history

concurrent_push_race.scenario: Two pipeline runs push to origin/main simultaneously
concurrent_push_race.risk: ELIMINATED — concurrency group sentinel-data-writer ensures sequential runs

stash_recovery_wipe.scenario: git reset --hard wipes reports/ during stash recovery
stash_recovery_wipe.risk: MITIGATED — FIX-1 (v154.0) ORIG_HEAD restore + now resolvable with fetch-depth:0
stash_recovery_wipe.residual_risk: LOW — ORIG_HEAD restore is functional with full history

dist_build_failure.risk: HARD FAIL before deployment — canary never fires, 404 never reaches customers

pages_deploy_failure.scenario: JamesIves action fails to push to gh-pages
pages_deploy_failure.risk: Action exits non-zero — pipeline fails, customers see previous deployment (unchanged)

cdn_propagation_delay.scenario: GitHub Pages CDN takes >5 minutes to propagate
cdn_propagation_delay.risk: Canary fails after 5-minute wait — pipeline fails, alert sent
cdn_propagation_delay.residual_risk: VERY LOW — measured propagation time is 2-4 minutes
